name: I & B Check Cashing
description_short: MoneyGram location at I & B Check Cashing offering money transfers, cash services, and financial transactions at 2346 Flatbush Ave in Brooklyn with extended weekday hours.
description_long:
I & B Check Cashing operates as a MoneyGram agent location in the Flatbush neighborhood of Brooklyn, New York. The business functions as a cash services hub providing access to MoneyGram's global money transfer network alongside traditional check-cashing services. The location has been established as a service point (#4) within the MoneyGram Brooklyn network, serving the local community's financial transaction needs.

The primary services offered include money transfers through MoneyGram's platform, which enables customers to send and receive money both domestically and internationally. The location provides cash-related financial services requiring valid legal identification for all transactions. Customers can manage transfers online or visit the physical location at 2346 Flatbush Avenue to conduct in-person transactions. The company emphasizes accessibility through both digital and offline service channels.

The business distinguishes itself through extended operating hours, remaining open from 7:00 AM to 8:00 PM Monday through Friday, with Saturday service until 5:00 PM. This schedule provides convenient access to cash services during both early morning and evening hours. The location's integration with MoneyGram's established infrastructure offers customers access to a trusted, internationally recognized money transfer platform. The physical storefront location in a residential Brooklyn neighborhood makes the service accessible to the local community.

I & B Check Cashing functions primarily as a MoneyGram agent rather than an independent check-cashing operation, which means service offerings are limited to what MoneyGram provides. The website content focuses on money transfer capabilities without detailing check-cashing specific features, fees, or other traditional check-cashing services that might be available. Operating hours on Sunday listed as 12:00 AM to 12:00 AM appear to be a website error requiring direct contact for clarification. The business model is agent-based, meaning offerings and policies align entirely with MoneyGram's corporate standards.
pros: Extended weekday hours (7 AM - 8 PM Monday-Friday) provide convenient access before and after typical business hours
Saturday service until 5 PM offers weekend accessibility for working customers
Part of MoneyGram's global money transfer network enabling international and domestic transfers
Both online and in-person service options allow flexible transaction management
Local neighborhood location in Flatbush, Brooklyn serves the surrounding community
Established as a verified MoneyGram location (#4 in Brooklyn network) with brand recognition
Legal ID requirement provides security and compliance for financial transactions
cons: Website does not display specific fees, exchange rates, or pricing for money transfer services
Limited information about traditional check-cashing services beyond MoneyGram transfers
Sunday hours listed as 12:00 AM - 12:00 AM appear to be a website error requiring phone confirmation
No details provided about maximum transfer amounts, processing times, or service limitations
Operates as a MoneyGram agent only, limiting services to MoneyGram's offerings without independent flexibility
best_for: Brooklyn residents needing convenient money transfers with extended evening hours
Customers sending international remittances through MoneyGram's established network
Working professionals requiring cash services outside typical 9-5 business hours
Individuals without bank accounts seeking reliable money transfer services
diagnosis: I & B Check Cashing functions as a MoneyGram agent location best suited for Brooklyn residents needing convenient money transfers and cash services with extended weekday and Saturday hours. The main limitation is that specific service details, fees, and traditional check-cashing capabilities are not documented on the MoneyGram website; direct contact at (718) 951-7111 is necessary for detailed service information and pricing.
services: Money transfer management online or in-person
In-person transaction services at physical location
Legal ID verification for cash services
